name: Airport Driving Range and Pro Shop
about: Airport Driving Range and Pro Shop is a comprehensive golf facility specializing in private instruction and a fully stocked pro shop. The venue offers a wide range of services including golf clinics, schools, corporate outings, special events, and club fitting. Led by Mike Callahan, a Top 100 Master Clubfitter, the facility uses advanced launch monitor technology for precise club fittings. It also operates as a driving range with various bucket sizes and a golf simulator rental option. The venue caters to golfers of all levels, from beginners to professionals, with a focus on improving performance through expert instruction and equipment.
why_golfers_like_it: Expert club fitting by a Top 100 Master Clubfitter
Comprehensive instructional programs for all skill levels
State-of-the-art launch monitor technology for precise data collection

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Club rentals are not explicitly mentioned, but grip and simulator rental services are available. For the best experience, bringing your own clubs is recommended, especially for club fittings.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: No food or drink services are mentioned. BYOB policies are not specified.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: The time for an 18-hole simulator session is not specified in the provided information.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers a youth discount of 1/2 off buckets for 12 years old and under, indicating it caters to junior golfers.
